sqlMap.select: select * from FirmEnvClientsLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into FirmEnvClientsLW(VersionSequence, PolicyKey EnvClientName TypesOfWork LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp ) values (#VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #EnvClientName# #TypesOfWork# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# ) SELECT IDENT_CURRENT('FirmEnvClientsLW') as last_insert_id
sqlMap.select: select FirmEnvClientsKey, EnvClientName, TypesOfWork, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from FirmEnvClientsLW where FirmEnvClientsKey = #FirmEnvClientsKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update FirmEnvClientsLW set
EnvClientName = #EnvClientName# EnvClientName = null TypesOfWork = #TypesOfWork# TypesOfWork = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null
where FirmEnvClientsKey = #FirmEnvClientsKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from FirmEnvClientsLW where FirmEnvClientsKey = #FirmEnvClientsKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from FirmEnvClientsLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select FirmEnvClientsKey, EnvClientName, TypesOfWork, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from FirmEnvClientsLW where FirmEnvClientsKey = #FirmEnvClientsKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select FirmEnvClientsKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey, EnvClientName, TypesOfWork, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp from FirmEnvClientsLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
